fields.description: Current step in the onboarding wizard

fields.label: Is Completed
fields.description: Whether the onboarding process has been completed

fields.label: Is Skipped
fields.description: Whether the user chose to skip the onboarding wizard

fields.label: Started At
fields.description: When the onboarding process was started

fields.label: Completed At
fields.description: When the onboarding process was completed

fields.label: Selected Archetype
fields.description: Industry archetype selected during onboarding (e.g., fashion, industrial, food)

fields.label: Template Applied
fields.description: Whether the industry archetype template has been applied

fields.label: Template Applied At
fields.description: When the archetype template was applied

fields.label: Template Result
fields.description: Summary of entities created by template application

fields.label: Company Info Data
fields.description: Form data collected during company_info step

fields.label: Industry Selection Data
fields.description: Form data collected during industry_selection step

fields.label: Product Structure Data
fields.description: Form data collected during product_structure step

fields.label: Channel Setup Data
fields.description: Form data collected during channel_setup step

fields.label: Workflow Preferences Data
fields.description: Form data collected during workflow_preferences step

fields.label: Compliance Setup Data
fields.description: Form data collected during compliance_setup step

fields.label: Customization Review Data
fields.description: Form data collected during customization_review step

fields.label: First Data Entry
fields.description: Form data collected during first_data step

fields.label: Guided Tour Data
fields.description: Form data collected during guided_tour step

fields.label: Steps Completed
fields.description: List of steps that have been completed

fields.label: Progress
fields.description: Overall onboarding progress percentage

fields.label: Last Step Completed At
fields.description: When the last step was completed

fields.label: Error Log
fields.description: Any errors encountered during onboarding
